questions.statement: A 3.5-billion-year-old Martian crater was recently named after which pioneering Indian geologist under the IAU&rsquo;s planetary naming guidelines?
Mr Bakul Limbasiya has been conferred the prestigious Asian Productivity Organisation (APO) National Award for his pioneering contributions to which sector?
India women&rsquo;s team recently clinched their second consecutive title in which global sporting event held in Dhaka?
What is the name of the premium commercial tower being developed in Dubai, named after Bollywood superstar Shah Rukh Khan?
Which commercial arm of the Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) signed an agreement with GalaxEye to resell its high-resolution satellite imagery?
